description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Ubuntu build that triggers on every push. The workflow has two jobs, Ubuntu (Jammy, Qt6, GCC) and Ubuntu (Jammy, Qt6 Clang), both running in an ubuntu:jammy container on ubuntu-latest. Each job checks out the code with submodules, installs git and dependencies using a custom script, builds the project with either GCC or Clang, deploys it, and uploads the resulting .deb artifacts.
